member.name: T:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController
member.summary: Analytics — admin-only token usage, cost statistics, and token management.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController.#ctor(RagChatbot.API.Services.IChatHistoryRepository,RagChatbot.API.Services.IUserRepository,RagChatbot.API.Services.IModerationViolationRepository)
member.summary: Analytics — admin-only token usage, cost statistics, and token management.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController.GetAnalytics
member.summary: Returns aggregated token usage and cost for all users (including zero-usage registered users), ordered by most recent activity, plus the top 5 most expensive sessions with full message history. Token limit status is included for each registered user.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AnalyticsController.AddTokens(System.String,RagChatbot.API.Models.AddTokensRequest)
member.summary: Add tokens to a registered user's token limit. Amount must be positive.

member.name: T:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController
member.summary: Authentication — login, token refresh, remember-me, and first-run admin setup.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController.Status
member.summary: Check whether the initial admin account has been created.
member.returns: setupRequired: true when no users exist in the database.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController.Setup(RagChatbot.API.Models.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Create the first admin account. Fails if any user already exists.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController.Register(RagChatbot.API.Models.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Register a new non-admin user account. Returns JWT tokens immediately on success.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController.Login(RagChatbot.API.Models.LoginRequest)
member.summary: Login with username and password. Set rememberMe to receive a 30-day cookie token.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController.Refresh(RagChatbot.API.Models.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token and rotated refresh token.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController.RememberMe(RagChatbot.API.Models.RememberMeRequest)
member.summary: Auto-login using a remember-me token stored in the browser cookie.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.AuthController.Logout(RagChatbot.API.Models.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Revoke the current refresh token and invalidate the session. Requires a valid JWT.

member.name: T:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatController
member.summary: Chat — send a question and receive an AI answer grounded in uploaded documents.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatController.#ctor(RagChatbot.API.Services.IChatService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatController})
member.summary: Chat — send a question and receive an AI answer grounded in uploaded documents.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatController.Chat(RagChatbot.API.Models.ChatRequest)
member.summary: Ask a question. Embeds query, retrieves top-5 chunks via vector search, generates a grounded answer with GPT-4o-mini, saves to session history, and returns sessionId for continuity. Works for authenticated users and anonymous users.

member.name: T:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatHistoryController
member.summary: Chat history — list, retrieve, and delete conversation sessions per user.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatHistoryController.#ctor(RagChatbot.API.Services.IChatHistoryRepository)
member.summary: Chat history — list, retrieve, and delete conversation sessions per user.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatHistoryController.GetHistory
member.summary: Get the 30 most recent chat sessions for the current user (messages excluded).

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatHistoryController.GetSession(System.String)
member.summary: Get a specific session including all messages.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatHistoryController.DeleteSession(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a specific chat session.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.ChatHistoryController.ClearAll
member.summary: Clear all chat history for the current user.

member.name: T:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.FileController
member.summary: File management — upload (admin only), list/download (any authenticated user), delete (admin only).

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.FileController.#ctor(RagChatbot.API.Services.IFileProcessingService,RagChatbot.API.Services.IEmbeddingService,RagChatbot.API.Services.IMongoDbService,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RagChatbot.API.Controllers.FileController})
member.summary: File management — upload (admin only), list/download (any authenticated user), delete (admin only).

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.FileController.Upload(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: Upload a document. Admin only. Computes a SHA-256 content hash — if the same content is already indexed (even under a different filename) the upload is rejected as a duplicate. Supported: PDF (≤25 MB), TXT / MD / DOCX / CSV (≤100 MB).

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.FileController.GetFiles
member.summary: List all documents currently indexed in the knowledge base. Any authenticated user.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.FileController.DownloadFile(System.String)
member.summary: Download extracted text content reconstructed from indexed chunks. Any authenticated user.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Controllers.FileController.DeleteFile(System.String)
member.summary: Remove all chunks and metadata for a document. Admin only.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Services.IModerationService.CheckAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Checks query against all moderation categories. Returns the result plus token counts consumed by the LLM-based check (built-in moderation API is free and always returns 0 tokens).

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Services.IMultiQueryService.GenerateVariationsAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Generates alternative phrasings of to broaden retrieval coverage. Returns an empty list (not an error) when the call fails — callers fall back to single-query search.

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Services.IQueryRewriteService.RewriteAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{RagChatbot.API.Models.SessionMessage})
member.summary: Rewrites into a self-contained search query using . Returns the original query unchanged when history is empty. Also returns the input/output token counts consumed by the rewrite call (0 when skipped).

member.name: M:RagChatbot.API.Services.IRerankingService.RerankAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{RagChatbot.API.Models.DocumentChunk},System.Int32)
member.summary: Reranks by relevance to and returns the top K. Also returns the input/output token counts consumed by the rerank call (0 on fallback).

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
